ab: Keliden no singsi kami tayra i pinanowangan, misarayaray i ka’ayaw no fawahan to mami’aca kami to paya.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: Micomod i pinanowangan i, sowal sa ko singsi; ora "ika’ayaway i. o ’aya’ayaman, kaikol i, o ’one’onelan, saniyaniyah hanto ita a minengneng.
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: Matalaway kako to ’oner, mansa cowa pinengneng kako to ’one’onelan.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: Adihay ko ’ayam to ma’araway no mako, ira i kilang cangra a miaefer, ma’araw haca ko ekong i ofang no kilang a mafoti’.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: I pinanowangan ira ko eco, efa ato lokedaw, i tiya ho cowa paka’araw kako to pinanowang, ma:hemek paka’araw anini.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: Adihayay ko misasingan no mako, sapipanengneng ciamaan ato ciinaan.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: Liyaw to a romi’ad toolen no mako ciama ato ciina malacafay a tayra.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起去。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
